item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Energy Star Reauthorization
item.description:
👀 Energy Star Reauthorization

Energy Star program reauthorization 119th Congress: federal energy-efficiency labeling standard · cooperative-class appliance-rebate composing · low-income retrofit provisions. Composes with LIHEAP + Renewable Energy PTC/ITC + Save-the-World Paper 2. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
